creator: JoeLu@joelu.m8.ntu.edu.tw
text:
The file sigc++config.h is mis-placed. This will cause trouble
    when it's used to compile the developer versions of gtk--.
	By the way, the official webpage of libsigc++ (along with that
    of gtk--) is moved to sourceforge.net lately, I updates the WWW link
    in DESCR as well.
